scenario: At sunrise, a lone 1950s cafe racer threads a foggy mountain pass, its headlight slicing through golden mist over pine-forested ridges in a moody, cinematic vignette.
style: cinematic, coherent visual continuity, natural motion, high production value, no captions

shots.title: Misty Pass at Dawn
shots.beat: Establish the vast foggy mountain pass at sunrise as the lone vintage motorcycle enters the frame.

shots.title: Headlight Through the Haze
shots.beat: The rider leans into a sweeping curve as the headlight cone pierces the rolling golden fog.

shots.title: Into the Golden Light
shots.beat: The cafe racer accelerates out of the bend and disappears into a radiant sunrise bloom on the ridge.
